integer.name: sequence
integer.title: Sequence
integer.help: Evaluation order. Categories with a lower sequence are evaluated first; the first formula returning true is assigned.

string.name: color
string.title: Color
string.help: Color used to highlight this category when displayed on product forms.

string.name: formula
string.title: Formula
string.help: Groovy formula returning true if the product belongs to this category. Available variables: coverageInDays, salesLast12Months, currentStock, stock6MonthsAgo.
